caption: The video captures a scene at Ciudad Real Madrid on a clear Monday morning, as indicated by the timestamp "Monday 13th 10:07." A large white bus with "Real Madrid" displayed on its digital sign is prominently featured, parked outside a modern building with glass windows and a well-maintained garden. The bus, labeled with the number 430 and the name "Esteban Rivas," appears to be part of the team's transportation. In the background, two individuals can be seen standing near the entrance, possibly staff or security personnel. The overall setting suggests a professional and organized environment, likely related to the football club's activities.
